issues.sample: The contact owns a 2021 Bentley Continental GT. The contact stated that an occupant was trapped in the rear seat of the vehicle. The contact called the local dealer, but the vehicle was not diagnosed or repaired. The contact stated the failure was related to NHTSA Campaign Number

narrative.headline: What 2021 Bentley Continental Gt owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Seats (67% of reports).
